luy-da-co-phu-ha.source: FishingPoints Ho Phu Ha: 14°22.648200'N, 109°6.173400'E; Bao Gia Lai: luy da co Phu Ha nam duoi chan nui Bich Ke, thon Phu Ha, tu suoi Cay Tram den gan bo ho Phu Ha; Quyet dinh 529/QD-UBND Gia Lai ngay 05/02/2026: thon Phu Ha, xa Phu My Bac
luy-da-co-phu-ha.note: Representative access-area point based on Ho Phu Ha. This is not an officially surveyed coordinate for the ancient stone wall itself and must remain low confidence.
luy-da-co-phu-ha.addressHint: Thon Phu Ha, xa Phu My Bac, Phu My, Gia Lai; khu rung phong ho nui Bich Ke, tu suoi Cay Tram den gan bo ho Phu Ha

suoi-da-vang.note: Coordinates identify Tuyet Tinh Coc, also known as Suoi Da Vang, Ho Trai Tim or Ho Bom, near Bai Xep and Ghenh Rang. Do not use similarly named places in Quang Ngai or Dong Nai.
suoi-da-vang.addressHint: Tuyet Tinh Coc / Suoi Da Vang / Ho Trai Tim, gan Bai Xep, Ghenh Rang, Gia Lai
